message:
feat: improve button navigation with left/right arrow selection

Implements intuitive button selection pattern for modal interface:

Button Navigation Pattern:
- Down arrow from last field moves to button area (Save focused)
- Left/right arrows select between Save and Cancel buttons
- Up arrow from buttons returns to last configuration field
- Enter key activates the currently focused button

Intuitive Flow:
1. Navigate config fields with ↑/↓ arrows
2. Down arrow past last field reaches Save button
3. Left/right arrows switch between Save ⟷ Cancel
4. Enter activates focused button
5. Up arrow returns to config fields

Updated Help Text:
- Fields: "↑/↓ navigate • Enter activate • 's' save • 'q' cancel"
- Buttons: "Enter activate • ←/→ select button • ↑ back to fields"
- Context-sensitive help based on current focus area

This creates natural modal navigation where:
- Content uses vertical navigation (↑/↓)
- Button bar uses horizontal navigation (←/→)
- Clear transition between content and action areas

Much more intuitive than trying to use ↑/↓ for button selection!

🤖 Generated with Claude Code
